# Phantom Mock

> Chrome extension (Manifest V3) that mocks REST API responses and overrides HTTP headers directly in the browser. Built with TypeScript 5.6, React 18, Vite + CRXJS. It patches `fetch` and `XMLHttpRequest` in the page world, manages header rules via `chrome.declarativeNetRequest`, and provides a full DevTools panel for rule editing, hit logging, and network capture. MIT-licensed, Chrome Web Store ready.

## Quick start

- Install: `npm install`
- Dev: `npm run dev` (Vite dev server on port 5173, load `dist/` as unpacked extension)
- Build: `npm run build`
- Test: `npm test`
- Lint: `npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck`

## Wiki

- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md) — high-level diagram + key abstractions
- [Modules](docs/modules.md) — table of every module with purpose
- [Data flow](docs/dataflow.md) — main pipelines traced end-to-end
- [Extending](docs/extending.md) — how to add a rule action type, matcher, or DevTools tab
- [Getting started](docs/getting-started.md) — install, run, test in detail
- [Troubleshooting](docs/troubleshooting.md) — known gotchas

## Modules

### Background (Service Worker)

- [`src/background/index.ts`](docs/modules.md#backgroundindexts) — message handler, state mutations, rule broadcasting
- [`src/background/storage.ts`](docs/modules.md#backgroundstoragets) — chrome.storage.local wrapper, state persistence
- [`src/background/rules-dnr.ts`](docs/modules.md#backgroundrules-dnrts) — translates rules to declarativeNetRequest format
- [`src/background/log.ts`](docs/modules.md#backgroundlogts) — in-memory hit log buffer with port-based pub/sub

### Content Script

- [`src/content/index.ts`](docs/modules.md#contentindexts) — bridges page world and service worker, relays rules/hits
- [`src/content/toast.ts`](docs/modules.md#contenttoastts) — shadow-DOM toast notifications on mock hits

### Page Injection

- [`src/injected/page-mock.ts`](docs/modules.md#injectedpage-mockts) — patches fetch/XHR, matches rules, returns mock responses

### DevTools Panel

- [`src/devtools/devtools.ts`](docs/modules.md#devtoolsdevtoolsts) — panel registration, HAR network capture
- [`src/devtools/panel.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolspaneltsx) — main React app with tabs (Rules, Editor, Hits, Capture, Settings)
- [`src/devtools/state-hook.ts`](docs/modules.md#devtoolsstate-hookts) — useAppState hook for querying/mutating background state
- [`src/devtools/components/RuleEditor.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscomponentsruleeditortsx) — form for creating/editing rules
- [`src/devtools/components/RulesTable.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscomponentsrulestabletsx) — domain-grouped rule list
- [`src/devtools/components/HitLog.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscomponentshitlogtsx) — real-time mock hit viewer
- [`src/devtools/components/Settings.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscomponentssettingstsx) — import/export, preferences, master toggle
- [`src/devtools/components/JsonBodyEditor.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscomponentsjsonbodyeditortsx) — syntax-highlighted JSON editor
- [`src/devtools/components/JsonTreeView.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscomponentsjsontreeviewtsx) — collapsible JSON tree
- [`src/devtools/capture/Capture.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscapturecapturetsx) — network capture UI with domain grouping
- [`src/devtools/capture/use-capture.ts`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscaptureuse-capturets) — hook for capture buffer and HAR import
- [`src/devtools/capture/PromoteToRule.tsx`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscapturepromotetorulertsx) — convert captured entry to mock rule
- [`src/devtools/capture/types.ts`](docs/modules.md#devtoolscapturetypests) — CapturedEntry interface and helpers

### Popup

- [`src/popup/main.tsx`](docs/modules.md#popupmaintsx) — browser-action popup with master toggle and rule counts

### Shared

- [`src/shared/types.ts`](docs/modules.md#sharedtypests) — Rule, Group, AppState, MockAction, HeaderAction, UIPreferences
- [`src/shared/messages.ts`](docs/modules.md#sharedmessagests) — RuntimeMessage union type, sendMessage helper
- [`src/shared/matcher.ts`](docs/modules.md#sharedmatcherts) — URL/method matching (exact, contains, regex)
- [`src/shared/constants.ts`](docs/modules.md#sharedconstantsts) — storage keys, message types, port names, limits
- [`src/shared/import-export.ts`](docs/modules.md#sharedimport-exportts) — bundle validation, import strategies (replace/merge/append)
- [`src/shared/prefs.ts`](docs/modules.md#sharedprefsts) — UI preferences storage (font size, toast toggle)
- [`src/shared/use-prefs.ts`](docs/modules.md#shareduse-prefsts) — React hook for preferences
- [`src/shared/url-parts.ts`](docs/modules.md#sharedurl-partsts) — URL parsing, domain/subdomain extraction

### Utils

- [`src/utils/id.ts`](docs/modules.md#utilsidts) — prefixed UUID generation, string-to-int hashing for DNR IDs

## Conventions

- TypeScript strict mode (`noUnusedLocals`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`, `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`)
- Prettier: single quotes, trailing commas, 100-char print width, 2-space indent
- ESLint: `@typescript-eslint` — no `any`, named exports only
- Vitest + happy-dom for tests; coverage targets 80%+ service worker, 90%+ message handlers
- Path alias: `@/*` maps to `src/*`
- ID prefixes: `rule_`, `grp_`, `cap_` via `newId()` in `src/utils/id.ts`
- Husky pre-commit: lint-staged runs ESLint + Prettier on staged `src/` and `tests/` files
